SpTU 1, 136 [List of temples][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (start of obverse missing)
o 1'o 1'

[...] ša₂ E₂.x.[...]

[...] in ...[...].

o 2'2'

[...] ša₂ E₂.SU₃.⸢SU₃.GAR.RA⸣

[...] in Esusugara.

o 3'3'

KI.[x].⸢DIRI?.GA šu⸣-[bat] ⸢KI.MIN⸣<(dINANA)> ša₂ E₂.GI.GUNU₄ki

...[...]... (is) the seat of ditto (Ištar) in Egigunu.

o 4'4'

KI.⸢UNU₂⸣.GA šu-⸢bat KI.MIN⸣<(dINANA)> ša₂ E₂.GI₆.PAR₃.IMIN.BI

Kiunuga (is) the seat of ditto (Ištar) in Egipariminbi.

o 5'5'

KI.ŠEN.ŠEN.NA šu-bat ⸢KI.MIN⸣<(dINANA)> ša₂ KISAL šap-lu-u₂

Kišenšena (is) the seat of ditto (Ištar) in the lower forecourt.

o 6'6'

EŠ₃.LI.LI.DIRI.GA šu-bat d⸢NIN⸣—i₃-li ša₂ dINANA ina muḫ-ḫi TUŠab

Ešlilidiriga (is) the seat of Belet-ili on which Ištar sits.

o 7'7'

E₂.ḪI.LI.DIRI.GA šu-bat dna-na-a ša₂ KA₂.U₆.DI ina E₂ te-ret

Ehilidiriga (is) the seat of Nanaya at Kaudi in the chapel of omens.

o 8'8'

E₂.NIR.MAḪ ⸢ki⸣ u₈ ze₂-eb-ba-ŋu₁₀ E₂ MIN<(NIR)> ṣi-ri₃ a-⸢šar⸣ šit-ti₃ šu-ṭu-bu E₂ gišNU₂

Enirmah, my place of sweet sleep, (is, translated into Akkadian) the majestic temple of lament, the place which makes sleep sweet, (also called) the bedchamber.

o 9'9'

E₂.⸢ZALAG₂⸣.GA E₂ ḫi-li-ṣi ša₂ KISAL e-lu-u₂

Ezalaga (is) the hilṣu-building in the upper forecourt (and)

o 10'10'

E₂.ME.⸢LAM⸣.AN.NA šu-bat dUTU ⸢ša₂⸣ KISAL E₂.ZALAG₂.GA

Emelamana (is) the seat of Šamaš in the forecourt of Ezalaga.

o 11'11'

KI.TUŠ.⸢SILIM?⸣.MA šu-bat dDUMU.MUNUS-MEŠ—UNUG[ki] ⸢ša₂⸣ KI.ŠU₂ : KI.TUŠ.INIM.DU₁₀.GA.LA₂ : šu-bat d  za⸢zannaru?⸣ x x

Kitušsilima (is) the seat of the Marat-Uruk in Kišu : Kitušinimdugala : the seat of Zannaru ....

o 12'12'

KI.TUŠ.⸢ḪE₂⸣.[NUN?.NA?] [...] x x x [x x]

Kitušhenuna (is) [...] ... [...].

Zaduazida (is) [...].

r 5'5'

ZA₃.DU₈.A₂.⸢GUB₃.BU šu-bat⸣ [...]

Zaduagubu (is) the seat [...].

r 6'6'

KI.SI.⸢GAR⸣ šu-bat ⸢de-ta-lak <<de-ta-lak>> ša₂ ši-ga-ri⸣

Kisigar (is) the seat of Etalak of the doorbolt.

r 7'7'

ZA₃ : re-⸢e⸣-šu₂ ZA₃ : ri-ik-su : aš₂-ri : pi-riš-ti₃ : ṣer-ret DINGIR-MEŠ

ZA₃ : head (is) ZA₃ : binding : place : secret : nose-rope of the gods.

r 8'8'

ZA₃ : ṭa-⸢a⸣-bu ZA₃ : a-ša₂-red : kul-lat : e-mu-qa : eš-ret DINGIR-MEŠ DU₃.A.BI

ZA₃ : good (is) ZA₃ : leader : totality : strength : all the shrines of the gods.

r 9'9'

ZI : re-⸢e⸣-šu₂ ZI : na-šu-u₂ ša₂ re-eš : ša₂-qu-u₂ ša₂ re-eš

ZI : head (is) ZI : lifting, of the head : becoming high, of the head.

r 10'10'

IGI : re-⸢e⸣-šu₂ IGI : maḫ-ri : IGI : reš-tu-u₂

IGI : head (is) IGI : in front : igi : first.

r 11'11'

IL₂ re-⸢e⸣-šu₂ IL₂ : na-šu-u₂ ša₂ ⸢re-eš⸣ : ša₂-⸢qu-u₂⸣ ša₂ re-e-šu₂

IL₂ head (is) IL₂ : lifting, of the head : becoming high, of the head.

r 12'12'

sa-an-⸢tak⸣SANTAK₄ re-e-⸢šu₂ : SANTAK₄⸣ [x] ⸢re-eš⸣-tu-u₂

SANTAK head : SANTAK : first.

r 13'13'

SAG ⸢re-e-šu₂ SAG?⸣ [... reš-tu]-⸢u₂?⸣ [x] ⸢zi?-i?-mu?⸣

SAG head (is) SAG [...] first : face.
